Tip of the day
Pay attention to the specifics of an achievement - some only count toward the unlock if a drop comes from an activity directly.

Extra crafty pants
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Legs
Value: 439
Search
Keyword: 		Crafting

Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

You may have had a wrench thrown in these pants, but it was all according to plan. They're much craftier now.

The Extra crafty pants item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Crafting lvl. 44.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

+5% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+7% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+1.5% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+10 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

+7% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+10% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+1.5% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+12 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

+10% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+13% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+1.75% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+14 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

+13% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+16% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+1.75% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+16 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

+16% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+20% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+2% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+18 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

+20% Work efficiency While doing Crafting.
+24% Chest finding While doing Crafting.
+2% No materials consumed While doing Crafting.
+20 Quality outcome While doing Crafting.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft extra crafty pants

You combine the crafting pants miraculously with the slipstick and basic wrench to make a pair of extra crafty pants.

Upgrade crafting pants with some tools.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft extra crafty pants Tailoring lvl. 31 Needs Basic Loom service or better. 1x Crafting pants
1x Slipstick
1x Simple wrench
2x Twine or 2x Kelp twine or 2x Ironweed twine		 1x Extra crafty pants

XP 		Base
Steps 		Base

XP/Step 		Full Recipe
